name: Config error: skip field must also appear in $metadata.common_input
description: Locks the byte-exact ConfigError message across engines when a skip field is declared but not listed in $metadata.common_input. Reference audit `.llmdoc-tmp/cpp-runtime-parity-audit/01-types-config-dag-cmd.md` P1-B: Go/Java/Python already enforce this validation; C++ added in this commit.

expected_error.wrapping_exact: pine: config error: operator "filter_op": skip field "_should_skip" must also appear in $metadata.common_input or $metadata.common_input_skip to ensure correct DAG ordering
